title: Build Webflow skill and introspect thestrategicveteran.com site via API
job:
Build a Webflow skill and introspect thestrategicveteran.com via the Webflow API.

**Site ID:** 66878d6a1082f3dca2c24ae6
**API Token:** available as $WEBFLOW_API_TOKEN environment variable
**API Base URL:** https://api.webflow.com/v2

## Step 1: Build the skill

Create a new skill at `skills/webflow/` with the following scripts. All scripts must:
- Use `$WEBFLOW_API_TOKEN` for auth (header: `Authorization: Bearer $WEBFLOW_API_TOKEN`)
- Use the site ID `66878d6a1082f3dca2c24ae6`
- Use Webflow API v2
- Output pretty-printed JSON
- Handle errors gracefully (check for missing token, bad responses, etc.)

Scripts to create:

**site-info.sh** — GET /sites/{site_id} — returns site details

**list-pages.sh** — GET /sites/{site_id}/pages — lists all pages on the site

**list-collections.sh** — GET /sites/{site_id}/collections — lists all CMS collections

**list-collection-items.sh <collection-id>** — GET /collections/{collection_id}/items — lists all items in a collection

**get-collection-item.sh <collection-id> <item-id>** — GET /collections/{collection_id}/items/{item_id} — gets a single item

**create-collection-item.sh <collection-id> <json-file>** — POST /collections/{collection_id}/items — creates a new CMS item from a JSON file

**update-collection-item.sh <collection-id> <item-id> <json-file>** — PATCH /collections/{collection_id}/items/{item_id} — updates an existing item from a JSON file

**publish-site.sh** — POST /sites/{site_id}/publish — publishes the site

Make all scripts executable. Use curl for all API calls.

## Step 2: Create SKILL.md

Create `skills/webflow/SKILL.md` with:
- Frontmatter: name: webflow, description: "Interact with thestrategicveteran.com Webflow site via API. Read and write pages, CMS collections, and items. Publish changes."
- Full usage documentation for each script with examples

## Step 3: Activate the skill

```bash
ln -s ../webflow skills/active/webflow
```

## Step 4: Test every script

Test each script against the live site:
- Run site-info.sh and verify it returns site data
- Run list-pages.sh and verify it lists pages
- Run list-collections.sh and verify it lists collections
- For at least one collection, run list-collection-items.sh and get-collection-item.sh
- Fix any issues before proceeding

## Step 5: Introspect and document the site

Using the skill scripts, thoroughly explore the entire site and save a comprehensive site map to `data/webflow-site-map.md`. This document will be used by future AI agents to make changes to the site, so it needs to be detailed and accurate.

The site map should include:

### Pages section
- List all 14 pages with: page ID, name, slug, SEO title, SEO description, and a note on what content is on each page

### Collections section
- List all collections with: collection ID, name, slug, and all field names + field types
- For each collection, list a sample of items (up to 10) with their IDs and names/slugs

### Site structure notes
- Note any patterns in how content is organized
- Note which collections correspond to which pages (e.g., podcast episodes collection → /podcast page)
- Note any fields that appear to be rich text, images, references to other collections

### Recommendations context
Include a section noting that this site belongs to Adam Peters / The Strategic Veteran and that the audit report at `data/website-audit.md` has identified the following missing pages that need to be built:
- /speaking
- /coaching
- /ai-consulting
- /community (The Stronghold)
- /press
- /episodes (episode archive)
- /about/adam (full bio)
- /amakaya
- /blog
- /store

## Step 6: Commit everything

Commit the skill files and the site map document with a clear commit message.
